ruleset.name: ByteChef Custom Rules
ruleset.description: ByteChef custom XPath rules — patterns not covered by built-in PMD categories.

rule.name: LoggedExceptionInCatchBlockAndRethrown
rule.message: Avoid redundant log error entries, pass the message and caught exception as the last argument to preserve the stack trace
rule.description: In a catch block that re-throws, every SLF4J log call must pass the custom error message (if any) with details about current context and the caught exception as its final argument. SLF4J appends the stack trace when the last argument is a Throwable and the message should tell about the error context.

rule.name: LogVariableNameWithPrivateStaticFinalModifiers
rule.message: Force Logger variable to be named as log and to be private, static, and final
rule.description: Always decler Logger variable to be named as log and to be private, static, and final
